metadata.name: Bug Hunting Workflow
metadata.description: Comprehensive bug investigation and fixing workflow with iterative hypothesis validation

nodes.directive: BUG FORMULATION: Describe the problem clearly and specifically. What doesn't work? What is the expected behavior? What is the actual behavior? Identify the feature/component name and create file ./[feature_name]/bug-description.md with the problem description.
nodes.completionCondition: Bug is clearly formulated and documented

feature_name.description: Name of the feature/component with the bug

nodes.directive: CREATE HYPOTHESES: Analyze possible bug causes from ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/bug-description.md. Create 2-3 specific hypotheses indicating files and code lines where the problem might be. CREATE FILE ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/hypotheses.md with the list of hypotheses, their probability, and verification plan.
nodes.completionCondition: Well-reasoned hypotheses about bug causes are created with verification plan

nodes.directive: VALIDATE HYPOTHESES: Delegate task to sonnet agent with FULL CONTEXT. In the prompt give the agent: 1) Full bug description from ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/bug-description.md 2) All hypotheses from ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/hypotheses.md 3) Explain this is MCP Moira workflow engine 4) INSTRUCT AGENT: find EXACT location in code where the problem is, create isolated test to reproduce, confirm root cause. IMPORTANT: DO NOT FIX CODE! Diagnostics only. SAVE: results in ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/hypothesis-validation.md, confirmed problem in ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/confirmed-issue.md.
nodes.completionCondition: Hypotheses validated, root cause found and confirmed

score.description: Diagnostics quality score (4pts accuracy + 3pts testing + 3pts technical spec)

nodes.directive:
ESCALATION: Hypothesis validation failed after {{max_hypothesis_iterations}} attempts. Present to user: 1) Original bug from ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/bug-description.md 2) All hypotheses from ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/hypotheses.md 3) Validation feedback: {{validate-hypotheses.validation_feedback}} 4) Ask user for guidance: provide additional context, suggest different approach, or manually investigate.
5) Reset counter and try validating hypotheses again
nodes.completionCondition: User provided guidance for next steps

action.description: User action: provide guidance, skip, or reset counter and retry

nodes.directive: REFINE HYPOTHESES: Based on validation results {{validate-hypotheses.validation_feedback}}, adjust hypotheses. Update file ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/hypotheses.md with obtained data and create more accurate hypotheses.

QUALITY BUG FIX: Delegate task to mcp-moira-lead-developer agent. IMPORTANT: Pass path to folder ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/ and file ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/confirmed-issue.md with EXACT problem description. DO NOT DICTATE HOW TO FIX! Tell agent: 1) Study the problem from confirmed-issue.md 2) Find ROOT CAUSE in architecture 3) Propose QUALITY solution without hacks 4) Implement fix and create tests 5) Verify all tests pass. SAVE: architectural analysis, fix plan, fix report.
nodes.completionCondition: Bug fixed with quality, with architectural analysis, without hacks

nodes.directive: PRESENT RESULTS: Present full work report from files ./{{formulate-bug.feature_name}}/ to user. Show: what was wrong ({{validate-hypotheses.confirmed_hypothesis}}), how the problem was diagnosed, what was fixed ({{implement-bug-fix.fix_summary}}), test results ({{implement-bug-fix.test_passes}}). REMIND about the need to commit the fix.
nodes.completionCondition: Full bug fix report presented to user

max_hypothesis_iterations.description: Maximum hypothesis validation attempts before escalation
